guest.homeBanner: Browse the games for free. Create an account to play, compete and join communities.
guest.communitySubtitle: Create an account to join communities, chat, and play with friends.
guest.tournamentSubtitle: Create an account to enter tournaments and climb the leaderboards.
guest.gemsSubtitle: Create an account to earn gems by playing and spend them on revives and hints.
guest.profileSubtitle: Create an account to track your stats, points and settings.

auth.ageRestricted: You must be at least 13 years old to register.
auth.regionNotSupported: Registration is not available in your region.
auth.dobInvalid: Enter a valid date as YYYY-MM-DD.
auth.legalNotice: By registering you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Your personal data is handled per the Uganda Data Protection and Privacy Act 2019.
auth.resetSubtitle: Enter your email or phone number. We'll send a 6-digit code.
auth.verifySubtitle: Enter the code sent to {{identifier}} and choose a new password.

home.tierTournamentDesc: No hints — compete for gem rewards

game.flaggedBody: An unusual move pattern was detected. This session has been ended.

gems.title: Gems
gems.explainer: In-game gems for revives, replays, and cosmetics. Gems have no cash value and can't be withdrawn.
gems.selfGift: You can't gift gems to yourself.
gems.dailyLimit: Daily gift limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
gems.noActivity: No gem activity yet. Play games to earn gems!

tournament.platformFunded: All gem rewards are platform-funded. Entry is always free.
tournament.noScores: No scores yet. Be the first!
tournament.createFailed: Could not create the tournament. Please try again.

community.name: Name
community.noneYetSubtitle: Create one to connect with players and earn weekly point distributions

profile.deleteWarning: Your data will be permanently erased within 30 days. You have 24 hours to cancel.
profile.legalNote: Account deletion is governed by the Uganda Data Protection and Privacy Act 2019. Your email, username, and gameplay data will be erased within 30 days.

settings.doNotSell: Do not sell my personal information

privacy.doNotSellExplain: GridClan Puzzles never sells your personal information. Recording this preference makes your request explicit and durable.
privacy.withdrawConsentExplain: You will stop receiving marketing emails immediately.
privacy.consentWithdrawn: You will no longer receive marketing emails.

errors.network: No connection. Check your network and try again.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.

howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.intro: GridClan Puzzles is a free, skill-based puzzle game. Solve puzzles to earn points and gems. Points are a pure measure of skill — they have no cash value and can never be withdrawn.

GRID_LOCKDOWN.name: Grid Lockdown
GRID_LOCKDOWN.how: Drag tiles to rearrange the grid until it matches the target pattern. Solve it in fewer moves and less time for a higher score.

SUM_CIPHER.name: Sum Cipher
SUM_CIPHER.how: Fill the empty cells with numbers so every row and group adds up to its target sum. Each number has to fit all the sums around it.

LINKED_RUSH.name: Linked Rush
LINKED_RUSH.how: Draw one continuous path that links every node exactly once, without crossing your line or revisiting a node.

solo.name: Solo
solo.desc: Play on your own to practise and earn points & gems.

friend.name: Friend
friend.desc: Invite a friend and go head-to-head on the same puzzle.

tournament.name: Tournament
tournament.desc: Compete against your community for gem rewards. Hints are disabled — pure skill.

howToPlay.scoring: The server scores every move you make, so results are always fair. Points reflect your skill only — there is no money, no pay-to-win, and no cashing out, ever.
howToPlay.gems: Gems are an in-game extra you earn by playing or watching optional ads. Spend them on hints, revives and replays, or gift them to friends. Gems have no real-world value and can’t be bought or exchanged for money.
howToPlay.fair: The game server is the referee. Moves that are impossible or impossibly fast are rejected, so everyone competes on a level field.

challenge.title: Friend challenge
challenge.intro: Challenge a friend: you both solve the same puzzle, then your scores are compared. No need to be online at the same time.
challenge.startBody: We’ll create a puzzle and start your round. Afterwards you’ll get a code to share.
challenge.createFailed: Could not start a challenge. Please try again.
challenge.notFoundBody: The code may be wrong or the challenge has expired.
challenge.invitedBody: Accept to play the same puzzle, then see who scored higher.
challenge.full: This challenge already has two players.
challenge.playBody: Solve the puzzle — your score is locked in when you finish.
challenge.waiting: Waiting for your friend to play their round…
challenge.sharePrompt: Share this code so a friend can join:
challenge.shareMessage: Play my GridClan puzzle challenge! Code: {{code}}

scrabble.title: Grid Scrabble
scrabble.homeDesc: Build words with a friend on a shared board, turn by turn.
scrabble.intro: Build words on a shared board with a friend, taking turns. Play anytime — they get notified when it’s their move.
scrabble.startBody: We’ll deal your tiles and give you a code to share with a friend.
scrabble.createFailed: Could not start a game. Please try again.
scrabble.joinFailed: Could not join that game. Check the code.
scrabble.waitingOpponent: Waiting for a friend to join
scrabble.sharePrompt: Share this code so a friend can join:
scrabble.shareMessage: Play Grid Scrabble with me! Code: {{code}}
scrabble.notYourTurn: Wait for your friend to play.
scrabble.pickBlank: Choose a letter for the blank
